330 I2I I2I_TUBERCULOSIS (I2I) Tuberculosis CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: infections - tuberculosis. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
331 I2J I2J_UTI_THRTY_DAYS (I2J) Urinary Tract Infection CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: infections - urinary tract infection in last 30 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
